title: 4 Pack Magnetic Osmo Pocket 3 ND 2-32 CPL Black Mist 1/4 Filter, 0.72X Wide Angle Lens for DJI Osmo Pocket 3,Pocket3 Neutral Density (Variable) & Circular Polarizing Accessories with Storage Case
features: Pocket3 Magnetic Filter Set: CPL / NDV2-32 / Black Mist 1/4 / 0.72x Wide-Angle Lens for OSMO Pocket 3 Creator Combo Accessories,HD Optical Glass/Gimbal Compatible Lens for Travel

NDV2-32 Filter: NDV2-32(1-5 Stops) Filter is adjustable by rotating, allows flexible light reduction, for scenes where exposure needs to be quickly adjusted in changing lighting conditions, offering more creativity and freedom.

0.72X Pocket 3 Wide Angle Lens: This wide-angle lens can reduce the focal length of Pocket 3 to 72% of standard, providing a wider field of view and achieve the 112 ° FOV shooting. This Pocket 3 wide angle Lens can reduce edge distortion to ensure a natural image, making it an ideal choice for balancing FOV and image quality, suitable for shooting landscapes, travel vlog, and group activities, etc.(We don't recommend using this lens during intense exercise)
Circular Polarizing Filter: It can polarize the light to eliminate unwanted reflections, enhances color saturation, and improve clarity and contrast.Such as water, glass or sky photography.

1/4 Black Diffusion Filter: 1/4 Black Mist Filter Softens highlights and lowers contrast, creating a dreamy, cinematic effect in portraits, videography, and night photography, adding a unique film-like quality to your images.
